title: taraxacum subcanescens
intro: Taraxacum subcanescens, also known as pale dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subcanescens include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum subcanescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
